modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about available postal services on campus

full_description_text:  
User wants to know about postal services offered on campus.  
They are unsure of the specific services available.  
This inquiry may relate to mailing, package delivery, or other postal needs.  
User submitted the question through a self-service form.
